messages.description: Controlled messages array. Consumer is fully responsible for maintaining and mutating this list.

onSendMessage.description: Fired when the user sends a message via the composer. Includes text, attachments, and inReplyTo when relevant.

onUserAction.description: Generic callback for in-message user actions (option click, custom plugin actions, etc.).

composerText.description: Controlled composer value. If undefined, the component manages composer state internally.

onComposerTextChange.description: Fires whenever composer text changes (typing, emoji insert, shortcode replacement).

composerPlaceholder.description: Placeholder shown in the composer textarea.

renderComposer.description: Replaces the entire composer with a custom render. Built-in actions are skipped.

showSendButton.description: Show the send button in the composer.

sendOnEnter.description: Send when Enter is pressed (Shift+Enter inserts newline).

showMic.description: Show the mic button. Defaults to true if onMicClick is set.

onMicClick.description: Callback when the mic button is clicked. Voice handling is delegated entirely to the consumer.

isMicActive.description: When true, the mic button shows a pulsing animation.

emoji.description: Enable + configure the emoji picker, categories, custom emojis, and shortcode replacement.

attachments.description: Enable + configure attachments: file types, max files, max size, display mode in completed messages, onAttach callback.

header.description: Header config: title, subtitle, logo, colors, button visibility flags, menu items.

renderHeader.description: Replace the entire header with a custom render.

icons.description: Override every built-in icon (minimize, close, restart, menu, send, mic, attach, emoji, bot, user, status icons).

tooltips.description: Tooltip text for every built-in icon button.

onMinimize.description: Fires when minimize is clicked. Return false to cancel.

onClose.description: Fires when close is clicked. Return false to cancel. Consumer is expected to unmount.

onRestart.description: Fires when restart is clicked. Return false to cancel.

isMinimized.description: Controlled minimized state. When true, the window does not render.

headerSlot.description: Custom content rendered between the header and message body.

aboveComposerSlot.description: Custom content rendered above the composer (suggestion chips, etc.).

belowComposerSlot.description: Custom content rendered below the composer (disclaimer, branding).

showAvatars.description: Show avatar circles next to messages.

customMessageTypes.description: Plug-in custom message renderers keyed by type. Merged into the built-in template map.

messageActions.description: Per-message action bar shown on hover/long-press. Consumer-driven items array.

reactions.description: Emoji reactions on messages. Consumer maintains reactions on each message and gets onReact.

feedback.description: Thumbs up/down feedback on assistant messages. Optional askForComment flag.

reply.description: Enable replies. Style: pinned (chip in composer only), quoted (embedded in new message), both.

typingUsers.description: List of users currently typing. Empty / undefined hides indicator.

showLoader.description: Force-show the typing dots loader (legacy single-bot mode).

onRetryMessage.description: Fires when the user clicks the failed-status icon to retry.

draggable.description: Enable dragging the window by the header. Disabled on mobile.

resizable.description: Enable resizing from any edge or corner. Disabled on mobile.

persist.description: true uses localStorage, 'session' uses sessionStorage, false/undefined disables persistence.

persistKey.description: Storage key for persisted position and size.

defaultPosition.description: Initial drag offset (only applies when draggable).

defaultSize.description: Initial size in pixels (only applies when resizable).

theme.description: Visual theme: classic, modern, iris, dusk, mist, ember, canvas, prism, aurora.

colorMode.description: Force light or dark mode. Auto follows OS / theme defaults.

cssVars.description: Override --euic-* CSS variables for primary, fonts, surfaces, etc.

className.description: Extra class on the root container.

style.description: Extra inline styles on the root container.

spacingCorner.description: Distance from the anchored corner edge.

spacingBottom.description: Distance from the anchored bottom edge.

ariaLabel.description: ARIA label for the window dialog.

announcements.description: Live-region announcements for new assistant messages.

trapFocus.description: Trap focus inside the window. Defaults to true in fullscreen mode.
